context_storage-usage-data-size-descript: Logical table data size from schema statistics.
context_storage-usage-overhead-descripti: Disk usage divided by data size for the current table.
context_storage-usage-used-description: Actual physical space currently occupied by this table's data in this storage group.
context_storage-usage-limit-description: Maximum capacity of this storage group, as reported by blob storage.
context_storage-usage-share-description: Percentage of this table's physical storage usage located in this storage group. Across all groups, the total is 100%.
